raw: {"questions":[{"label":"Landing check","name":"What has been most on your mind in your first two weeks here, Riley?","description":"Gives Riley room to set the agenda and surface what feels most present before narrowing in.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"settling","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Team contact","name":"Who have you actually had the most useful direct contact with so far?","description":"Surfaces whether his onboarding has been mostly async and where live context is still thin.","purpose":"topic","stage":"settling","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Ownership map","name":"What feels clearest to you about what you own right now?","description":"Checks whether he has a usable map of boundaries and decision space.","purpose":"topic","stage":"orientation","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3}]},{"label":"Gray areas","name":"Where are the ownership boundaries still fuzzy for you?","description":"Finds the places where he may be guessing at scope or decision rights.","purpose":"topic","stage":"orientation","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3}]},{"label":"Context gaps","name":"What context are you still waiting on before you change a design or make an architecture call?","description":"Surfaces missing information that could quietly lead to rework or wrong assumptions.","purpose":"competency","stage":"blockers","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Ask early","name":"What questions do you think you should ask earlier here?","description":"Reveals where he may be holding back from asking for context soon enough.","purpose":"competency","stage":"blockers","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Incident norms","name":"How should you know when to escalate during an incident here?","description":"Checks whether he understands the practical trigger points for escalation and support.","purpose":"competency","stage":"blockers","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Support network","name":"Who do you want to lean on first when you hit something unclear?","description":"Identifies the people and channels that should become his default support path.","purpose":"topic","stage":"connection","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Useful next step","name":"What would make the next two weeks feel steadier for you, Riley?","description":"Closes on concrete support or adjustments that would improve his onboarding momentum.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"connection","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]}]}
